titleStmt.title: SII 15.522: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 522. (B.K. No. 145 of 1928-29.) HAṄGARGI, BADAMI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the platform of the house of Sivaputri Govindappa Ganiger.

It records the regulations laid down by Mahāsāmanta Daśavarmma in respect of the administration of the tract of Peṅgarage Twelve, such as concessions in land assessment and collection of fines for offences.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁta sāmaṁtahīraṁ
vīrāvatāraṁ vīracūḍāmaṇi vandiciṁtāmaṇi kumaramārttaṇḍa
māvana vajradaṇḍaṁ siṁgana cakraṁ ripucakravakraṁ saraṇāgatavajra
paṁjaraṁ sāmaṁtadikkuṁjaraṁ nuḍidaṁte gaṇḍaṁ samarapracaṇḍaṁ
satyanityōdayaṁ pusipoḻdadātaṁ pusige pēsuvanīvare dēvaṁ
śrī maddeśavarmmadēvaṁ peṁgarage panneraḍakkaṁ koṭṭa maryyādeye
ntendaḍe Urttabari saṁkariya keyi parihārayaṟuvaṁśaṁ ma
ttariṁge pāgaṁ caḷāvameṟuttuṁ bandāṟu barisakkedhruvakamēṟuvudu
takkiluḻta varśaṁ pāgaṁ caḷāvameṟenālkuvarisakke paṇavinoḷnilpudu
koḍaṁgeyge nelanuṁ nēsaṟuvuḷḷannagaṁ beḍuṁgoḷosage Utsāhaṁ kā
ṇneyeṁdivu modalāge teṟeyāvā jīvamāvudukkaṁ milla
dhāreya mēreya kayge pannirmmattariṁge gadyāṇa 1 Āṇeyaṁ
mikkade paṇa 5 surigegiḻtaḍe gadyā 3 Iṟidaḍe gadyā 1 pa 5 peyda
ḍe paṇa 5 braṇamokkaḍa gadyā 1 pa 5 kiṟugaḷaviṁge gadyā 3 pergga
ḍaviṁge gadyā 6 pāradvārakke gadyā 6 jātināsage gadyā 6 reṇḍege koḍa
gūsiṁge parihāravī maryyādeyaṁ tappade naḍeyisidoṁgādityavā
ramumuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyuṁ vyatīpātamuṁ kūḍi bara bāṇarāsi
yoḷe sāviraṁ kavileyaṁ dānaṁgeyda phaḷamakku [.]
Digital edition of SII 15.522 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
